functional_audit.check: resolvePressureProfile(loadSignals, stateSignals) returns a pressure bucket string from ENUM-02 load-signal slugs and AUTH-05 state-signal answers, matching bTIAw/bTIBB branch logic
calculateUserPressureProfile(userId) reads persisted onboarding signals, computes profile, and patches pressure_profile_text mirroring bTIBO/bTICJ ChangeThing

functional_audit.check: onboardingProfilePipeline invokes calculateUserPressureProfile immediately after classification, matching bTGNJ workflow bTHqE ScheduleAPIEvent ordering

gaps.finding: STATE_SEVERITY maps grounded:1 but ENUM-03/AUTH-05 store regulated for bTIBe (Regulated); regulated falls through to default severity 2, skewing combined score for calm/stable respondents

critiques.finding: buildPressureProfile STATE_SEVERITY uses grounded:1 but onboarding captures regulated (bTIBe) per ENUM-03; regulated users get default severity 2 instead of low-severity 1, potentially shifting pressure bucket vs Bubble intent
critiques.alternative: Add regulated:1 (alias grounded:1) to STATE_SEVERITY and deduplicate classification.ts computePressureProfile to import resolvePressureProfile

critiques.finding: classification.ts still embeds duplicate computePressureProfile logic instead of importing resolvePressureProfile from buildPressureProfile.ts; two copies can drift
critiques.alternative: Replace computePressureProfile in classification.ts with import { resolvePressureProfile } from './userProfile/buildPressureProfile'

critiques.finding: Implementation returns 4 aggregate buckets while ir/resolver.json pressure_profile_os values are compound strings; matches brownfield prototype but may diverge from Bubble bTIBB return strings if AC bTIBG branch resolves to option_set display text
critiques.alternative: Confirm against drsam-99657.bubble /api/bTIBB condition tree whether bTIAw returns aggregate buckets or pressure_profile_os compound labels; align output or document intentional simplification
evidence: ir/resolver.json — bTIAk, bTIAo, bTIAp, bTIAq, bTIAu, bTIAv display_name entries
cursor-impl-cycle/output/decompose/MOD-DRSAM-API.json — AC-1 references bTIBB return value bTIBG branch logic

critiques.finding: calculateUserPressureProfile lines 34–38 contain a no-op conditional (both branches return profile) left over from stub logic
critiques.alternative: Remove dead branch and return profile directly after patch

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover resolvePressureProfile threshold boundaries or regulated vs grounded slug handling
critiques.alternative: Add focused tests for severity averaging edge cases and ENUM-03 slug coverage
